article_title: Repeal of the 4,500-Litre Minimum Production Requirement for Wineries

briefs.title: Winery 4,500-Litre Annual Minimum Production Requirement Repealed — No Action Needed
briefs.summary: BC wineries are no longer required to produce a minimum of 4,500 litres annually to renew their licence, aligning them with breweries and distilleries. The change takes effect automatically; dormancy rules still apply to low-production licences.
briefs.article_title: Repeal of the 4,500-Litre Minimum Production Requirement for Wineries
